description: Recto: letter to Moses ha-Kohen השר האדיר, whose name appears in the opening of the letter and in the address on verso. Also mentions Mordechai השר הנכבד. It is prefaced with two lines of biblical quotations, marked with supralinear dots in a triangle. The extant text consists of opening blessings; the content (not preserved) is introduced by [אלו הטורים להו[דיע. There is an additional greeting in the top margin, ושלמה יגדל. Verso: address. Probably late 11th-12th century. (Information from CUDL)
